caption: In a medical simulation setting, several healthcare professionals are gathered around a patient on a gurney. One individual in the foreground wears a blue scrub top and blue gloves, while another person wears a grey hoodie and blue gloves. Two others are dressed in full blue scrubs, and a final person wears a black jacket over blue scrubs; all individuals are wearing surgical masks. They are focused on a patient covered by white sheets, with the person in the black jacket reaching toward the bedside. The background contains medical storage shelves stocked with various supplies and equipment. A purple banner across the bottom of the scene contains a stylized silhouette of a person and the text "Day 4 Cooling & CRT Post Arrest" and "Sim Week". Across the sequence, the group remains in place, with slight shifts in posture and hand movements as they coordinate their care for the patient.
